data.title: DICK'S Sporting Goods launches Cookie Jar & A Dream Studios for original sports films, solidifying position.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on August 7, 2025, the establishment of Cookie Jar & A Dream Studios was declared by DICK'S Sporting Goods (NYSE: DKS). This in-house content and production studio aims to share impactful, human-centric narratives intersecting with sports. The initiative is founded on the premise of commemorating meaningful moments involving sports.

data.title: NoHo, Inc. (Stock Symbol: DRNK) announces strategic growth initiatives and corporate update, focusing on forming new divisions and acquisitions.
data.description: Today, on August 7, 2025, in Las Vegas, NoHo, Inc. unveiled several strategic plans. The company, trading under the Stock Symbol DRNK, shared its intention to establish new divisions, pursue specific acquisitions, and implement operational strategies. These initiatives aim to foster growth and expansion for NoHo.

data.title: Latitude Food Allergy Care to open 4 clinics in Southern California, offering specialized food allergy treatment.
data.description: The leading network of food allergy clinics in the United States, Latitude Food Allergy Care, is set to expand its reach by opening four new clinics in Southern California. This move aims to address the lack of comprehensive food allergy care in the region. The clinics are scheduled to open in Los Angeles on August 7, 2025. This expansion underscores a significant step in providing accessible and specialized care for individuals affected by food allergies in Southern California.

data.title: Dreame Technology launches affordable L40s robot vacuum series, providing professional-grade cleaning for all households.
data.description: A newly launched lineup from Dreame Technology brings high-quality performance within reach for all consumers, offering top-notch cleaning capabilities at an affordable price point. The introduction of the L40s model in New York on August 7, 2025, showcases the company's commitment to delivering professional-grade products accessible to a wider audience. Known for its smart home appliances, Dreame Technology continues to expand its innovative solutions to cater to diverse cleaning needs.

data.title: EFA and TMCF team up for Ruth Mullen Memorial Scholarship Program to support HBCU students' editorial careers.
data.description: In a recent press release on August 7, 2025, it was shared that the Editorial Freelancers Association (EFA) has revealed a significant partnership with the Thurgood Marshall College Fund (TMCF). Together, they are set to manage the Ruth Mullen Memorial Scholarship Program starting from the upcoming academic year of 2025-2026. This alliance marks a new chapter in supporting students with educational funding opportunities.

data.title: Final approval granted for $1 billion mixed-use development, The Ranch, in Gilbert, Arizona, marking the way for construction.
data.description: Final approval has been granted for the commencement of construction on The Ranch, one of Arizona's largest and eagerly awaited mixed-use developments. Located in Gilbert, Arizona, this landmark project is valued at $1 billion. The approval sets the stage for the development to proceed with its plans to transform the heart of Gilbert into a vibrant mixed-use area.

data.title: Litera invests in Postilize for growth-tech stack in Legal Business. New PRM solution combines Postilize and Litera products.
data.description: Foundation Proactive, in partnership with Postilize, introduces a pioneering Proactive Relationship Management (PRM) solution for legal teams in Chicago on August 7, 2025. This innovative system merges Postilize with Litera's Foundation and Peppermint products to offer a tailored approach based on intent and experience. This collaboration aims to enhance legal team efficiency and effectiveness by providing a unique PRM solution.

data.title: TeamSnap and Bauer Hockey collaborate to offer hockey training through the app, including pro-led drills. Nationwide skills challenge starts in August.
data.description: In an exciting update, the TeamSnap app now offers pro-designed drills, equipment guides, and training advice. Additionally, a countrywide skills challenge is set to begin in August 2025. The collaboration between TeamSnap, a prominent youth sports management platform, and Bauer Hockey, a global leader in hockey gear, promises to enhance the experience for all involved. This initiative aims to improve skill development and provide valuable resources to coaches, players, and parents. Stay tuned for more details on this exciting opportunity to participate in the upcoming skills challenge.

data.title: Coherent and Apple deepen their partnership with a new multiyear VCSEL agreement in Texas, strengthening their alliance.
data.description: Coherent and Apple have recently solidified their partnership through a new multiyear strategic supply agreement. This agreement signifies an expansion of their existing collaboration.

data.title: Voyager Technologies acquires EMSI, a CA-based developer of AI software for space radar systems. CEO stresses AI importance.
data.description: Denver-based Voyager Technologies, listed on NYSE as VOYG, has recently completed the acquisition of ElectroMagnetic Systems, Inc. (EMSI), a leading California company specializing in AI and machine learning-driven automated target recognition software and intelligence analytics designed for space-based radar systems. Voyager's CEO, Dylan Taylor, emphasized the pivotal role of AI in modern operations, highlighting its capability to transform data into power and heighten decision-making speeds to surpass competitors. Through EMSI's cutting-edge technology, Voyager aims to enhance its offerings and bolster its strategic position in the market.

data.title: Vegas-based Tacotarian wins 2025 Hot Concepts Award by Nation's Restaurant News, recognized for innovation in plant-based Mexican cuisine.
data.description: A plant-based taqueria originating in Las Vegas has been acknowledged as one of the top innovative and influential restaurant brands in the United States. Tacotarian, the acclaimed Mexican concept focused on plant-based cuisine, has recently been honored as one of the 2025 Hot Concepts by Nation's Restaurant News. This recognition adds to the growing success of Tacotarian, highlighting its impact on the industry. The news was announced on August 7, 2025, marking a significant achievement for the Vegas-based restaurant.

data.title: Gen Z lacking soft skills & professionalism making employers hesitant to hire recent grads. Author offers solution.
data.description: An author in PALO ALTO, Calif., on Aug. 7, 2025, provided a solution to the prevalent issue of many employers expressing reluctance to hire new college graduates. Numerous hiring managers cited reasons such as insufficient soft skills, professionalism, and readiness for the workplace as barriers to hiring recent grads. The author's timely solution aimed to address this challenge in the current job market scenario.
LUTNICK: U.S. EXPECTS $50 BLN A MONTH IN TARIFF REVENUES

data.title: NUBURU to acquire TEKNE following Italian government guidance; working on phased plan in compliance. #BURU #TEKNE
data.description: NUBURU, Inc., a prominent company in high-performance blue laser technology, revealed a significant development regarding its acquisition of TEKNE S.p.A. The formal notice from the Italian government under the "Golden Power" framework has been received. NUBURU will collaborate with TEKNE on a phased acquisition strategy as directed by the Italian government instead of obtaining immediate clearance or a final decision. NUBURU is listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol BURU.

data.title: Ongoing study on US children shows resurgence of respiratory viruses post-pandemic, sparking hope for future vaccines and treatment. Aug. 7, 2025.
data.description: Recent research conducted in children in the United States has revealed a resurgence of endemic respiratory viruses. The study, based in Aurora, Colorado, published its initial findings on August 7, 2025. This ongoing study, which spans several years, highlights the necessity for accelerating the development of future vaccines and treatments in response to these viruses.

data.title: Dr. Dennis Sehgal, MD, opens MDVIP primary care practice serving Huntsville, Athens, and nearby areas.
data.description: Today, MDVIP, a leading provider of membership-based healthcare, revealed the inclusion of Dennis Sehgal, MD, MBA, in their services. Dr. Sehgal will be practicing family medicine in Madison, catering to Huntsville, Athens, and other nearby communities. This development was announced on August 7, 2025, with the specific locations being Madison, Alabama, and Boca Raton, Florida. The practice is set to serve a substantial number of residents in these areas, providing personalized medical care under the MDVIP network.

data.title: Valspar® reveals "Warm Eucalyptus" as 2026 Color of the Year - 8004-28F. Enhancing spaces with a vintage-inspired green.
data.description: Introducing Warm Eucalyptus 8004-28F, a vintage-inspired green shade that exudes a calming and classic vibe to enhance any environment. The color is brought to you by Valspar, a top paint and coatings company, revered by DIY enthusiasts and professionals alike. The announcement was made in Cleveland on August 7, 2025, through a press release issued by PRNewswire.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick concludes comments on Fox Business

data.title: Mews named as leader in 2025 IDC MarketScape for Hospitality Property Management Systems. #PMS #TechForwardHotel
data.description: Mews, a top operating system for the hospitality industry, was recognized as a Leader in the IDC MarketScape's Worldwide Hospitality Property Management Systems 2025 Vendor Assessment. This report, released in August 2025 under document #US52038025, highlighted Mews' impressive performance in the sector. The company's innovative approach to hotel technology and efficiency has placed them at the forefront of the industry. This acknowledgment solidifies Mews' position as a key player in the market, showcasing their commitment to excellence in hospitality services.

data.title: Guidewire's DEVHack 2025 winners announced, Team "GigGuards" takes first place. Sponsored by AWS.
data.description: SAN MATEO, California - Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) applauds the champions of DEVHack 2025, its second yearly online hackathon aimed at involving the most extensive group of developers in the global Property and Casualty (P&C) sector and highlighting their prowess in addressing genuine business obstacles. The contest was solely supported by Guidewire PartnerConnect Technology Alliance partner and favored cloud provider Amazon Web Services (AWS).
